examples: But it seems that the only line of communication that has not changed is between boss and underling.
Our healthy participants had a basically accurate visual image of their own body, but the brain's model of the hand underling position sense was highly distorted.
In fact, top Albright aides insist that she feels perfectly secure with her new underling.
As for teamwork, Marty has no interest in treating Jeannie, his lone female underling, with kid gloves.
